concerns.text: Task T013 'Add validation and error handling for invalid compositions (flag with error code)' lacks concrete deliverable: no file path specified, no error code format defined, no output artifact named. Implementer cannot execute deterministically.
Task T014 'Add logging for descriptor computation steps and excluded samples' lacks concrete deliverable: no file path, no log format, no output artifact. Cannot verify completion.

Task T022 'Integrate class weighting or SMOTE handling if imbalance detected (FR-006 mitigation)' lacks concrete deliverable: no file path, no integration point specified, no output artifact. Implementer cannot execute.

Task T028 'Implement stratification analysis by alloy system type' has no concrete deliverable or verification method. This capability is not specified in any user story or functional requirement (scope creep). No file path, no output format.
Task T033 'Code cleanup and refactoring' is unexecutable: no specific code identified, no cleanup criteria, no success metric. Implementer cannot determine what to clean or when done.

Task T034 'Performance optimization across all stories (ensure ≤6h runtime)' lacks concrete deliverable: no specific optimization target, no measurement method, no file paths. Cannot verify completion.
Task T035 'Additional unit tests (if requested) in tests/unit/' is conditional and undefined: no specific tests named, no file paths. Implementer cannot execute without knowing which tests to write.

Task T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan' is too coarse: does not enumerate specific directories/files to create. Downstream atomizer will need to split into concrete file-creation tasks.
